case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS AZUCENA, ERNESTO A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,346.91 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT AZUCENA, ERNESTO A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AZUCENA, ERNESTO A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AZUCENA, ERNESTO A. $1,346.91 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,388.91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $28.54 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT AZUCENA, ERNESTO A.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AZUCENA, ERNESTO A.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED. COMPUTER PROBLEM, CAN NOT ENTER IT.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT AZUCENA, ERNESTO A.
